atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports severe right upper arm pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started approximately 18 hours ago after spiking the ball

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started approximately 18 hours ago after being kicked by an opponent

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ibuprofen is not providing adequate relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates the pain as a 9 out of 10

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in the right arm

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a proximal humerus fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The injury is likely due to a fall during a volleyball game

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Rescribe lortab 500mg every 6 hours as needed for pain, quantity 20

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a long arm cast and sling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess fracture alignment

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has swelling and erythema on her right shoulder

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has tenderness over the right shoulder
